# nullcloud_database (Data Source)

Fetches a NullCloud managed database by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nullcloud_database" "example" {
  id = "db-abc123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the database.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `engine` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `plan` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `subnet_ids` (List of String)
- `version` (String)
